prestazioni: LS1 (5.7L Gen III V8) forced induction via Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer, 58lb/min flow) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valve, supporting 12psi on E85 for ~650whp on stock internals with ARP head studs (PN 234-4317) and MLS head gaskets (Fel-Pro PN 1014-2).

Full Motec M150 ECU with LS1-specific firmware (M1 Tune V5.3) controlling sequential fuel injection via ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min) and dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps (walbro 450lph in-tank pump as primary), paired with a custom 3.5" aluminum intake manifold (FAST LSXR) and Accufab 90mm throttle body.

Darton Sleeved LS1 block (Darton MID sleeves, 4.125" bore) with Callies Compstar 4340 forged crank (4.000" stroke), Carrillo H-beam rods (6.125" length), and JE FSR forged pistons (9.5:1 compression, 2618 alloy) for 408ci displacement, mated to a Tremec T56 Magnum XL 6-speed with 26-spline input shaft and carbon synchros, paired with a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch (875lb clamp load) and aluminum flywheel.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (C5-specific, bolt-on fenders with 2.5" flares, carbon fiber front splitter, and duckbill rear wing) paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (3M 1080-M227) and blacked-out emblems via Vinyl Depot overlays.

OEM+ aggressive stance via KW Variant 3 coilovers (C5-specific, 24-way adjustable damping, 1.5" drop) with HRE FF01 wheels (19x10.5 +25 front, 19x12 +35 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors front) and 4-piston rear (345mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara inserts) and custom door panels (Alcantara with red stitching), paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and AiM MXL2 data logger with GPS lap timer, mounted via a custom CNC billet aluminum dash mount.
